lessonTitleText: God Saves Elisha from an Army
lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: How could Elisha tell the king of Israel about Syria’s secret plans?
answers: God let him hear what the king of Syria said
He was best friends with the King of Syria

questions.text: What did the king of Syria think when his plans were discovered?
answers: One of his servants was a spy
The king of Israel was lucky
There must be a hidden microphone recording him

questions.text: What did the servants tell the king of Syria?
answers: Elisha knows what you say, even in your bedroom
There is a spy among us
We've been sharing your secrets with Elisha
The Lord God is punishing us

questions.text: What did the king of Syria send his soldiers to do?
What did Elisha’s servant see when God opened his eyes?
answers: An army of angels with fiery horses and chariots

questions.text: What happened when Elisha prayed for the soldiers?
answers: God made the soldiers run away
God sent fire from the sky
God made the soldiers fall asleep

questions.text: Where did Elisha lead the blind army?
What did the king of Israel want to do to the soldiers?
What did Elisha tell the king to do instead?
answers: Feed them and send them home
Shave their hair and their beards

questions.text: What happened after the soldiers returned home?
answers: They became followers of the Lord God
